description: Phase α (v0.6): the `sign::actor_can_auto_apply` predicate gates which (tier, kind) pairs may be applied without prior human review. Doctrine: tier permits review-context kinds only (annotations); never state-changing kinds (review verdicts, retractions, confidence revisions). Pre-v0.6 actors with tier=None always fall through to the not-permitted branch.

cases.name: tier=auto-notes + finding.caveated → rejects (caveat is state context, defer to v0.7)
no tier (None) + finding.note → rejects (untiered actors never auto-apply)
unknown tier + finding.note → rejects (forward-compat: unknown tiers never grant)
